---
name: pr-review
version: 1.0.0
description: |
  Reviews pull requests before merging. Checks for security issues, code quality,
  and test coverage. Use when asked to "review this PR", "code review", or
  "review my pull request".
allowed-tools:
  - Bash
  - Read
  - Grep
---

# pr-review

Pre-merge pull request review.
